opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Building agents at the OS level introduces serious permission and sandboxing problems that most tutorials gloss over. Real security requires proper capability-based access control, not just running as a privileged service.
actions.reasoning: I have built production AI agent systems and terminal tooling, giving me hands-on experience with agent sandboxing, tool orchestration, and system-level agent integration patterns.
